description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly white upper and a brown rubber sole. The upper is constructed from smooth synthetic or leather material, featuring subtle perforations on the side panel for breathability. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue, providing comfort and support around the ankle. White laces are threaded through standard eyelets, and the tongue and heel area show some branding details. The outsole is flat with a textured grip, suitable for urban walking or casual sports. The overall design is clean and minimalistic, making it versatile for various urban environments.
description: A white low-top sneaker with a brown rubber sole, perforated side panel, and standard lacing. The design is clean, minimal, and suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the perforated side panel, smooth white upper, and brown sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Right side view with similar features to the left, showing the clean side panel and sole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar and subtle branding on the heel tab.
